label: https://trailhead.salesforce.com/content/learn/modules/apex_database
intent: Prioritize hands-on developer work: Apex, SOQL, DML, and coding. Exclude quizzes, certification exams, knowledge checks, and trivia.

units.title: Get Started with Apex
units.reason: This unit provides a foundational introduction to Apex, essential for hands-on developer work as requested by the intent.

units.title: Use sObjects
units.reason: Understanding sObjects is crucial for interacting with Salesforce data in Apex, directly supporting the hands-on coding goal.

units.title: Write SOQL Queries
units.reason: This unit directly addresses the intent's request for SOQL, providing hands-on experience with querying data in Apex.

units.title: Manipulate Records with DML
units.reason: This unit focuses on DML, a core hands-on developer skill explicitly requested, for modifying Salesforce records with Apex.

units.title: Write SOSL Queries
units.reason: This unit covers SOSL, another essential querying language for Apex developers, complementing SOQL for comprehensive search capabilities.
